page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Scoring functions for the dream / sage challenges
page_metadata.biotools__summary: DREAMTools is a Python package for evaluating DREAM challenge scoring metrics. DREAMTools provides a command line interface that enables researchers to test new methods on past challenges, as well as a framework for scoring new challenges.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DREAMTools is a Python package for evaluating DREAM challenge scoring metrics. DREAMTools provides a command line interface that enables researchers to test new methods on past challenges, as well as a framework for scoring new challenges.
